[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000100000 1
4 000000001 1
5 110000010 3
6 000000100 1
7 000100000 1

01 10 000100001 2
12 21 000000010 1
23 32 000000000 a match 0 1 2
34 43 000000100 1 match 6
45 54 010000100 2
56 65 011010001 4
67 76 001000000 1
70 07 001000000 1

02 20 000000000 a match 0 1 2
13 31 000000000 a match 0 1 2
24 42 010000000 1
35 53 000000100 1 match 6
46 64 010100000 2
57 75 001000100 2
60 06 001100001 3
71 17 000000000 a match 0 1 2

03 30 000000000 a match 0 1 2
14 41 000100000 1 match 3 7
25 52 010000000 1
36 63 000000000 a match 0 1 2
47 74 000000100 1 match 6
50 05 001000001 2
61 16 000100011 3
72 27 000000000 a match 0 1 2

04 40 000100000 1 match 3 7
15 51 000000001 1 match 4
26 62 110000010 3 match 5
37 73 000000100 1 match 6
[completion]
